title: Smoked Turkey Grain Salad
ingredients: 20 sun-dried tomatoes, soaked 10 minutes and drained
¾ cup diced sweet onion (Walla Walla or Vidalia preferred)
instructions: Bring wild rice and broth to a boil.
Cover and simmer until rice is tender but firm.
Transfer rice to a bowl and cool completely.
Add turkey, tomatoes, and onion to the cooled rice.
Toss avocado with lemon juice and add gently to the salad.
Whisk together red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and parsley.
Add dressing to salad and toss gently.
notes: Walla Walla or Vidalia onions are preferred for their sweetness
Soak sun-dried tomatoes for 10 minutes before using
Handle avocado gently to avoid breaking it up too much
